name: @ggoldani/stellarmcp
description: Stellar MCP server focused on execution-grade agent tooling.

scripts.verify:base: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.verify:phase:a: npm run verify:base && npm run smoke:phase1
scripts.verify:phase:b: npm run verify:base && npm run smoke:phase1 && npm run smoke:autonomy:mock
scripts.verify:phase:c: npm run verify:base && npm run smoke:phase1 && npm run smoke:autonomy:mock && npm run pack:sanity && GENERATOR_E2E_FULL=1 npm run generator:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --test build/tests/accounts.test.js build/tests/assets.test.js build/tests/autonomy.test.js build/tests/config.test.js build/tests/errors.test.js build/tests/generator.test.js build/tests/http-lib.test.js build/tests/http-transport.test.js build/tests/meta.test.js build/tests/network.test.js build/tests/payments.test.js build/tests/redact.test.js build/tests/seps.test.js build/tests/stellar.test.js build/tests/tools-md-drift.test.js build/tests/validate.test.js build/tests/valuation.test.js build/tests/xdr.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
